title: Change Description Editor
description: Safe inline editor for change **description** on Overview (`PATCH` with `{ description }` only — does not invalidate approvals).
context: Safe inline editor for change **description** on Overview (`PATCH` with `{ description }` only — does not invalidate approvals).

rules.requirement: multiline description with save when dirty
rules: MUST render textarea and **Save** (`studio-change-description-save`) disabled when draft equals saved value or while PATCH is in flight.
MUST invoke `patchChange(name, { description })` via `usePatchChange` without opening scope or validate dialogs.

scenarios.requirement: multiline description with save when dirty
scenarios.name: Save disabled when unchanged
